mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.password, u.nickname, u.phone, u.email, u.user_type, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time
r.id as role_id, r.role_name, r.description as role_description
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, nickname, phone, email, user_type, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{userType}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT , FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}
SELECT , FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id
SELECT , FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE username = #{username})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone})
